message:
fix(core,types,vdbe): lock-byte page corruption guard, SIMD classifier refactor, and forbid unsafe_code in VDBE

- connection.rs: record_integrity_page_owner now rejects references to
  the reserved lock-byte page (page_size-dependent) as corrupt, catching
  a class of B-tree corruption where interior nodes point to the lock
  page
- record.rs: extract serialize_integer_record_with_classifier() from
  simd_serialize_integer_record(), minor formatting adjustments to SIMD
  comparison chains
- Cargo.toml: now that the SIMD MakeRecord path uses safe portable_simd
  in fsqlite-types, VDBE can forbid unsafe_code like the rest of the
  workspace
- engine.rs: corresponding call-site updates for the renamed function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,10 +67,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "pipeline_stages"
 harness = false
 
-# Cannot inherit workspace lints because workspace forbids unsafe_code
-# and the SIMD MakeRecord helper requires a tightly scoped unsafe island.
+# Keep VDBE aligned with the workspace-wide unsafe ban. The SIMD MakeRecord
+# path now uses safe `portable_simd` code in `fsqlite-types`.
 [lints.rust]
-unsafe_code = "allow"
+unsafe_code = "forbid"
 
 [lints.clippy]
 pedantic = { level = "deny", priority = -1 }
